zh.lifeSummary: 當John Welles 5th Baron Welles於1352年4月20日出生在英國林可爾史爾康尼霍爾時，他的父親John Welles 4th Lord Welles17歲，母親Maude de Ros20歲。他於1386年5月與Eleanor de Mowbray結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年8月26日在英國林可爾史爾享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Welles 5th Baron Welles于1352年4月20日出生在英国林可爾史爾康尼霍爾时，他的父亲John Welles 4th Lord Welles17岁，母亲Maude de Ros20岁。他于1386年5月与Eleanor de Mowbray结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年8月26日在英国林可爾史爾享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Welles 5th Baron Welles was born on 20 April 1352, in Conisholme, Lincolnshire, England, his father, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, was 17 and his mother, Maude de Ros, was 20. He married Eleanor de Mowbray in May 1386. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 26 August 1421, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Welles 5th Baron Welles est né le 20 avril 1352, à Conisholme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Maude de Ros, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Mowbray en mai 1386. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 août 1421, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Welles 5th Baron Welles am 20. April 1352 in Conisholme, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Welles 4th Lord Welles 17 und seine Mutter Maude de Ros 20. Er hat im Mai 1386 Eleanor de Mowbray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. August 1421 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Welles 5th Baron Welles è nato il il 20 aprile 1352 nel Conisholme, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Maude de Ros, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Mowbray nel maggio 1386. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 agosto 1421, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Welles 5th Baron Wellesが1352年4月20日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアコニショルメで生まれた時，父John Welles 4th Lord Wellesは17歳，母Maude de Rosは20歳であった。1386年5月にEleanor de Mowbrayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年8月26日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Welles 5th Baron Welles(이)가 1352년 4월 20일 영국 링코실르 코니쇼에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Welles 4th Lord Welles(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude de Ros(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1386년 5월 Eleanor de Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 8월 26일 영국 링코실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.20 April 1352–26 August 1421: 20 de abril de 1352–26 de agosto de 1421
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Welles 5th Baron Welles nasceu em 20 de abril de 1352, em Conisholme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Maude de Ros, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Mowbray em maio de 1386. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1421, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Welles 5th Baron Welles родился 20 апреля 1352 г. в местности конишолм, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Welles 4th Lord Welles было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude de Ros, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Mowbray май 1386 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 августа 1421 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

sm.from 1361 to 1421: mai le 1361 e o'o I le 1421

es.20 April 1352–26 August 1421: 20 de abril de 1352–26 de agosto de 1421
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Welles 5th Baron Welles nació el 20 de abril de 1352, en Conisholme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Welles 4th Lord Welles, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Maude de Ros, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Mowbray en mayo de 1386. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1421, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
